issue_summary: Duplicate code in "MultivariateRealOptimizer" and "DifferentiableMultivariateRealOptimizer" moved to new interface "BaseMultivariateRealOptimizer". New "AbstractScalarOptimizer" superclass allow implementations that do not use derivatives. Deprecated "protected" fields. "NonLinearConjugateGradientOptimizer" changed to make use of the newly added accessors instead of the "protected" fields.
javadoc_before:
/** * Base class for implementing optimizers for multivariate scalar functions. *

This base class handles the boilerplate methods associated to thresholds * settings, iterations and evaluations counting.

* @version $Revision$ $Date$ * @since 2.0 */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * Base class for implementing optimizers for multivariate scalar
 * differentiable functions.
 * It contains boiler-plate code for dealing with gradient evaluation.
 *
 * @version $Revision$ $Date$
 * @since 2.0
 */
